ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "poster_link" TEXT /* Link to the movie poster */,
  "series_title" TEXT /* Title of the movie series */,
  "released_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certificate */,
  "runtime" TEXT /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language(s) in which the movie is available */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company details */,
  "trailer_link" TEXT /* Link to the movie trailer */,
  "is_series" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie is part of a series */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDB rating of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or description of the movie */,
  "meta_score" INTEGER /* Metascore of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_certificate_id FOREIGN KEY ("certificate_id") REFERENCES certificates ("certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stars" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the star */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the star */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the star */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the star */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_stars" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star */,
  "star_order" INTEGER /* Order of the star in the movie credits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the certificate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
column_names: Runtime of the movie in minutes
Language(s) in which the movie is available
Indicates if the movie is part of a series
Overview or description of the movie
Order of the star in the movie credits
Date when the rating was given
Date when the review was written
